nodes.label: main-logo.jpg — Baygan e Man brand logo (JPEG, high-res). Dark teal rounded-square background with gold calligraphic serif wordmark reading 'Baygan e Man'. A stylized feather/quill flourish sits atop the 'g'. Warm gold metallic texture on letterforms. Primary brand identity asset.
nodes.norm_label: main-logo.jpg — baygan e man brand logo (jpeg, high-res). dark teal rounded-square background with gold calligraphic serif wordmark reading 'baygan e man'. a stylized feather/quill flourish sits atop the 'g'. warm gold metallic texture on letterforms. primary brand identity asset.

nodes.label: main-logo.png — Baygan e Man brand logo (PNG, smaller/icon variant). Identical design: dark teal rounded-square background with gold calligraphic 'Baygan e Man' wordmark and feather flourish. Used as app icon / favicon-scale asset.
nodes.norm_label: main-logo.png — baygan e man brand logo (png, smaller/icon variant). identical design: dark teal rounded-square background with gold calligraphic 'baygan e man' wordmark and feather flourish. used as app icon / favicon-scale asset.
